zh.Kingsbridge, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文金斯布利其
zh.Spaxton, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特斯帕斯頓
zh.Houndston,Yeovil,Somerset,England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特也奧維爾
zh.Holcombe Rogus, Devon, England: 英國戴文霍爾可姆 洛古斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hill於1338年1月9日出生在英國戴文艾可謝特時，他的父親Richard Hill18歲，母親Joan de Bassett15歲。他於1379年與Denise Durborough在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1389年在英國戴文艾可謝特被列為justice of the king's bench。他去世於1408年6月24日在英國戴文霍爾可姆 洛古斯享年70歲，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Hill于1338年1月9日出生在英国戴文艾可謝特时，他的父亲Richard Hill18岁，母亲Joan de Bassett15岁。他于1379年与Denise Durborough在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1389年在英国戴文艾可謝特被列为justice of the king's bench。他去世于1408年6月24日在英国戴文霍爾可姆 洛古斯享年70岁，埋葬在英国戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hill was born on 9 January 1338, in Exeter, Devon, England, his father, Richard Hill, was 18 and his mother, Joan de Bassett, was 15. He married Denise Durborough in 1379, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. In 1389, his occupation is listed as justice of the king's bench in Exeter, Devon, England. He died on 24 June 1408, in Holcombe Rogus, Devon, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hill est né le 9 janvier 1338, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Hill, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Joan de Bassett, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Denise Durborough en 1379, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. En 1389, sa profession de son indiquée est justice of the king's bench à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1408, à Holcombe Rogus, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Hill am 9. Januar 1338 in Exeter, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Hill 18 und seine Mutter Joan de Bassett 15. Er hat 1379 in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom Denise Durborough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. 1389 ist sein Beruf als justice of the king's bench in Exeter, Devon, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. Juni 1408 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Holcombe Rogus, Devon, England und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hill è nato il il 9 gennaio 1338 nel Exeter, Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard Hill, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Bassett, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Denise Durborough nel 1379, nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Nel 1389, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice of the king's bench nel Exeter, Devon, England. Morì il 24 giugno 1408, nel Holcombe Rogus, Devon, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hillが1338年1月9日にイギリスデボンエクセターで生まれた時，父Richard Hillは18歳，母Joan de Bassettは15歳であった。1379年にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターでDenise Durboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1389年，イギリスデボンエクセターでの職業はjustice of the king's benchと記録されている。彼は1408年6月24日にイギリスデボンホールコンベ ログスで70歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hill(이)가 1338년 1월 9일 영국 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hill(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Bassett(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 Denise Durborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1389년, 그의 직업은 영국 데폰 세터에서 justice of the king's bench이었다. 그는 1408년 6월 24일 영국 데폰 홀코브 로구스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.9 January 1338–24 June 1408: 9 de janeiro de 1338–24 de junho de 1408
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hill nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1338, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Hill, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Bassett, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Denise Durborough em 1379, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Em 1389, sua profissão aparece como justice of the king's bench em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1408, em Holcombe Rogus, Devon, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hill родился 9 января 1338 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Hill было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Bassett, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Denise Durborough в 1379 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. В 1389 году он работал по профессии justice of the king's bench в местности эксетир, девон, Англия. Он умер 24 июня 1408 г. в местности холкомб рогус, девон, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности эксетир, девон, Англия.

es.9 January 1338–24 June 1408: 9 de enero de 1338–24 de junio de 1408
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Hill nació el 9 de enero de 1338, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Hill, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Joan de Bassett, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Denise Durborough en 1379, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. En 1389, su ocupación registrada era justice of the king's bench en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra. Murió el 24 de junio de 1408, en Holcombe Rogus, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.
